legal_basis: Article 1649 AC du Code general des impots (CGI); Loi n.2016-1918 du 29 decembre 2016; Directive EU 2014/107/UE (DAC2) transposee en droit francais
crs_status: Committed and active - first exchange 2017 (early adopter)
reporting_deadline: 30 June following the 31 December reporting year-end
submission_method: EDI (Echange de Donnees Informatise) via tiers-declarants portal; XML upload per DGFiP Cahier des charges
xml_schema: DGFiP-specific XML schema based on OECD CRS XML with French adaptations; reference document: Cahier des charges DAC2/CRS v3.6
nil_report_required: Yes - nil declaration required when no reportable accounts
data_retention_years: 6 years under French fiscal law (Livre des procedures fiscales)
msg_ref_id_format: FR + FI SIREN number + reporting year + sequence; per Cahier des charges specifications
doc_ref_id_format: FR + reporting year + SIREN + internal account reference; per Cahier des charges
local_fi_scope: Etablissements de credit (banks) regulated by ACPR
Societes de gestion (asset managers) regulated by AMF
Assureurs (life insurance companies) regulated by ACPR for investment-linked contracts
OPC (Organismes de Placement Collectif): OPCVM, FIA
excluded_accounts: Qualified credit card issuer accounts (where applicable)
PEA (Plan d'Epargne en Actions) - exempt per French law
Livret A, LDD, LEP regulated savings - specifically excluded
local_specific_rules: CAHIER DES CHARGES: The DGFiP Cahier des charges DAC2/CRS (currently v3.6) is the mandatory technical specification. All XML submissions must comply with this document. It is only available in French.

TIERS-DECLARANTS MODEL: France requires FIs to submit via accredited third-party declarants (tiers-declarants) OR directly via the EDI portal. FIs without EDI capability must contract with an accredited intermediary.
DAC2 vs CRS: For EU partner exchanges, France applies DAC2 (EU Directive). For non-EU MCAA partners, OECD CRS rules apply. The Cahier des charges covers both.
SIREN NUMBER: The French SIREN (9-digit company identifier) is used as the primary FI identifier in DocRefId and MessageRefId construction.
PEA EXCLUSION: Plans d'Epargne en Actions are specifically excluded from CRS scope under French law, unlike standard OECD rules which would require evaluation.

AMF/ACPR SUPERVISION: DGFiP handles data collection; ACPR supervises banking/insurance compliance; AMF supervises investment firm compliance. FIs may receive inspection notices from their sector regulator.
NIL DECLARATION: French law requires a formal nil declaration (declaration neante). Failure to file nil declaration is a compliance breach.
FATCA COORDINATION: FATCA obligations for French FIs are also handled via DGFiP under France's Model 1A IGA, using the same EDI infrastructure but a different XML schema.
LANGUAGE: No official English guidance available. All DGFiP documentation is in French. FIs must work with French-language specifications.

rejection_error_codes.resolution: Verifier le SIREN de l'etablissement declarant
Utiliser OECD2 avec CorrDocRefId pour correction

rejection_error_codes.desc: Schema XML non conforme au Cahier des charges
rejection_error_codes.resolution: Valider contre le XSD fourni dans le Cahier des charges v3.6
Utiliser les codes ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 valides

penalties.failure_to_report: Article 1736 CGI: EUR 200 per account not reported; max EUR 50,000 per year per FI
penalties.false_declaration: Article 1729 CGI: 40% to 80% of tax evaded by account holder (liability of FI if complicit)

contact.notes: All DGFiP communications are in French only

fatca.portal: Same EDI tiers-declarants infrastructure; separate XML schema per French FATCA Cahier des charges
key_rules: France Model 1A: French FIs report FATCA data to DGFiP, which passes to IRS.
French FIs do NOT need individual IRS FATCA registration; covered by IGA.
US indicia: standard 7 indicia. Preuve contraire rules apply (account holder may rebut indicia).
FATCA technical spec is separate from CRS Cahier des charges; both in French.

gaps: DGFiP Cahier des charges v3.6 exact PDF URL should be added when fetched
French rejection error codes should be verified against latest Cahier des charges
EDI portal submission URL (tiers-declarants login) should be added
